title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #11, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #7 as the Tontatta prepare their plan against Doflamingo while Franky, the Toy Soldier, and the rebels reveal Dressrosa’s hidden suffering.
